backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the CoTimetable app, implementing user registration (max 2 users), messaging with optional file attachments, and per-user timetable entries with recurrence support. Includes admin reset functionality and mixes in blob storage and authorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, pages, and utilities for the Sky: Children of the Light themed CoTimetable app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, accent, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the CoTimetable Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider (forced dark), and renders either a loading spinner, Dashboard, or LandingPage based on authentication and profile state, with persistent AnimatedSkyBackground and MusicToggleButton.
frontend/src/components/AddEditTaskModal: Modal dialog for creating or editing timetable entries, supporting title, start/end datetime inputs, and a recurrence selector (one-time, weekday, weekend), wired to backend add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only dialog that requires a passcode to unlock, then allows triggering a full system reset via the backend resetSystem call, clearing all React Query cache on success.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedSkyBackg: Renders a fixed, full-screen decorative background with a sky gradient, starfield image, animated light rays, drifting cloud layers, and floating particles using inline styles and CSS animations.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Provides a real-time chat UI between two users, supporting text messages and file/image attachments with upload progress, rendered as styled message bubbles with timestamps.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the app shell with a sticky header containing the logo, an Internet Identity login/logout button, and an admin panel trigger, wrapping page content as children.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggleButto: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that toggles ambient background music on/off using the useAmbientMusic hook, with visual state feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal dialog that collects a display name and timezone from a new user and calls the register mutation, preventing dismissal until setup is complete.
frontend/src/components/TimetableView.ts: Renders a day-view timetable grid with hourly slots, displaying the user's scheduled task blocks with support for recurrence rules, date navigation, and add/edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/components/UserClockDisplay: Displays live clock cards for the current user and their partner, showing local time, date, and timezone, with skeleton and waiting states while data loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientMusic.ts: Manages a singleton ambient music audio instance with play/pause/toggle controls, persisting playback state to sessionStorage across re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, registration, messaging, and timetable operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS theme using Tailwind and OKLCH color tokens for a dark midnight-blue palette with amber/gold accents, plus utility classes for glass cards, glows, and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page composing the live clocks panel, timetable view, and chat interface in a responsive layout for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: React landing page component with animated sky background, hero section, login button using Internet Identity, and feature highlights for the CoTimetable app.
frontend/src/utils/timezones.ts: Exports a comprehensive list of IANA timezone strings for use in timezone selection dropdowns throughout the app.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Raleway, Cinzel), a Sky: Children of the Light color palette (midnight, amber, gold, indigo), and plugin setup for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the CoTimetable app's architecture, existing features, known bugs (registration, timetable, admin reset), and the current fix request context at schema version 17.
